description: Triggers when user needs to setup, configure, or use Tailwind CSS 4, including design tokens, dark mode, and cn() utility
should_trigger: Setup Tailwind CSS 4 in my project
Configure custom design tokens in Tailwind
Create a responsive layout with Tailwind utility classes
Use the cn() utility to merge Tailwind classes conditionally
Add CSS custom properties in Tailwind @theme
should_not_trigger: Setup CSS modules for my project
Write vanilla CSS for my component
